card_description: Palmer Eldritch is a fictional character referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 9 Exegesis passages. Associated with dictionary terms: Palmer Eldritch. Context: "Dick synthesizes the "Magdeburg hemispheres" of his 1974 experience: the external transformation of Fullerton into Rome and the internal transformation of himself into an early Christian Essene."
